items.title: AWS Introduces Workload Credentials Provider for Automated Certificate and Secret Management
items.summaryShort: AWS Introduces Workload Credentials Provider for Automated Certificate and Secret Management. AWS has recently announced the AWS Workload Credentials Provider to automatically deliver and refresh certificates and secrets for applications.

items.title: Vercel Introduces Eve, an Open-Source Framework for Building AI Agents
items.summaryShort: Vercel Introduces Eve, an Open-Source Framework for Building AI Agents. Vercel has released Eve, an open-source framework for building, deploying, and operating AI agents in production.

items.title: Presentation: AI Works, Pull Requests Don’t: How AI Is Breaking the SDLC and What To Do About It
items.summaryShort: Presentation: AI Works, Pull Requests Don’t: How AI Is Breaking the SDLC and What To Do About It. Michael Webster discusses the rise of headless AI agents and their impact on software delivery pipelines.

items.title: Dapr 1.18 Introduces Verifiable Execution, Bringing Cryptographic Trust to AI Agents and Workflows
items.summaryShort: Dapr 1.18 Introduces Verifiable Execution, Bringing Cryptographic Trust to AI Agents and Workflows. Diagrid has announced the release of Dapr 1.18, introducing what it calls Verifiable Execution, a new set of capabilities designed to bring

items.title: Argo CD 3.5 Tightens Supply Chain Security with Internal mTLS and Source Integrity
items.summaryShort: Argo CD 3.5 Tightens Supply Chain Security with Internal mTLS and Source Integrity. The Argo CD project released a v3.5 release candidate in June 2026.

items.title: Asian AI startups launch Mythos-like models as Anthropic's export ban drags on
items.summaryShort: Asian AI startups launch Mythos-like models as Anthropic's export ban drags on. New models are launching in Asia that promise Mythos-like capabilities without fear of an export ban.

items.title: Trump Admin releases Anthropic Mythos to be used by more than 100 US companies, agencies
items.summaryShort: Trump Admin releases Anthropic Mythos to be used by more than 100 US companies, agencies. Over 100 companies and government agencies are reportedly authorized to use Mythos 5, including their non-American employees.

items.title: FTC gives Musk the OK to acquire SpaceX alumni startup Mesh
items.summaryShort: FTC gives Musk the OK to acquire SpaceX alumni startup Mesh. Mesh came out of stealth in February with a $50 million Series A.
